name: Micron Technology, Inc.
summary: 美光是美国存储器与存储解决方案龙头，核心变量是 AI 数据中心带来的 HBM、DDR5/LPDDR 与 SSD 需求、存储价格周期、产能/资本开支和先进封装能力。

business.description: Micron 设计、制造并销售 DRAM、NAND、NOR、HBM、SSD、托管 NAND、模块和多芯片封装等存储器与存储产品，面向云与数据中心、移动与客户端、汽车、工业和消费电子场景。FY2025 第四财季起，公司按 Cloud Memory、Core Data Center、Mobile and Client、Automotive and Embedded 四个业务单元披露。

segments.name: Cloud Memory Business Unit
segments.nameZh: 云内存业务单元
segments.note: 主要面向 hyperscale 云数据中心，涵盖 HBM、DDR5/DDR4、LPDDR5 和 GDDR6 等内存产品。
segments.noteZh: 主要面向 hyperscale 云数据中心，涵盖 HBM、DDR5/DDR4、LPDDR5 和 GDDR6 等内存产品。
segments.noteEn: Focused on hyperscale cloud data centers, including HBM, DDR5/DDR4, LPDDR5, and GDDR6 memory products.

segments.name: Core Data Center Business Unit
segments.nameZh: 核心数据中心业务单元
segments.note: 面向中型云、企业和 OEM 数据中心客户，覆盖服务器 DRAM、数据中心 SSD 和 NAND 组件。
segments.noteZh: 面向中型云、企业和 OEM 数据中心客户，覆盖服务器 DRAM、数据中心 SSD 和 NAND 组件。
segments.noteEn: Focused on mid-tier cloud, enterprise, and OEM data center customers, including server DRAM, data center SSDs, and NAND components.

segments.name: Mobile and Client Business Unit
segments.nameZh: 移动与客户端业务单元
segments.note: 覆盖智能手机、PC、客户端 SSD、LPDDR、UFS 和托管 NAND 等产品。
segments.noteZh: 覆盖智能手机、PC、客户端 SSD、LPDDR、UFS 和托管 NAND 等产品。
segments.noteEn: Covers smartphones, PCs, client SSDs, LPDDR, UFS, and managed NAND products.

segments.name: Automotive and Embedded Business Unit
segments.nameZh: 汽车与嵌入式业务单元
segments.note: 面向汽车、工业和消费嵌入式场景的长生命周期内存与存储。
segments.noteZh: 面向汽车、工业和消费嵌入式场景的长生命周期内存与存储。
segments.noteEn: Long-life memory and storage products for automotive, industrial, and embedded consumer applications.

business.thesis: Micron 的核心判断已从周期复苏进一步转向 AI 内存紧供给和战略客户协议兑现；Q3 FY2026 创纪录收入、毛利率和 Q4 指引强化了 HBM、数据中心 SSD 与先进 DRAM/NAND 的供给约束属性。
riskNotes: 存储器仍有明显周期性，价格、库存和客户采购节奏会显著影响收入与毛利率。
HBM、先进 DRAM、NAND 和封装扩产依赖昂贵设备、材料和长期资本开支，供给约束可能同时带来增长和执行风险。
客户集中度、出口管制、地缘政策和中国市场变化会影响需求结构、产能规划与产品组合。

failureConditions.condition: 存储器仍有明显周期性，价格、库存和客户采购节奏会显著影响收入与毛利率。
failureConditions.conditionZh: 存储器仍有明显周期性，价格、库存和客户采购节奏会显著影响收入与毛利率。
failureConditions.conditionEn: The thesis weakens if filings, announcements, or operating data show this risk is not affecting orders, margins, capacity, or customer adoption.
failureConditions.monitor: 持续跟踪公告、财报、订单/客户披露、毛利率、现金流和产能扩张节奏。
failureConditions.monitorZh: 持续跟踪公告、财报、订单/客户披露、毛利率、现金流和产能扩张节奏。
failureConditions.monitorEn: Monitor filings, announcements, customer disclosures, margin trend, cash-flow conversion, and capacity expansion timing.

failureConditions.condition: HBM、先进 DRAM、NAND 和封装扩产依赖昂贵设备、材料和长期资本开支，供给约束可能同时带来增长和执行风险。
failureConditions.conditionZh: HBM、先进 DRAM、NAND 和封装扩产依赖昂贵设备、材料和长期资本开支，供给约束可能同时带来增长和执行风险。
failureConditions.conditionEn: The thesis weakens if filings, announcements, or operating data show this risk is not affecting orders, margins, capacity, or customer adoption.
failureConditions.monitor: 持续跟踪公告、财报、订单/客户披露、毛利率、现金流和产能扩张节奏。

failureConditions.monitorEn: Monitor filings, announcements, customer disclosures, margin trend, cash-flow conversion, and capacity expansion timing.

failureConditions.condition: 客户集中度、出口管制、地缘政策和中国市场变化会影响需求结构、产能规划与产品组合。
failureConditions.conditionZh: 客户集中度、出口管制、地缘政策和中国市场变化会影响需求结构、产能规划与产品组合。
failureConditions.conditionEn: The thesis weakens if filings, announcements, or operating data show this risk is not affecting orders, margins, capacity, or customer adoption.
failureConditions.monitor: 持续跟踪公告、财报、订单/客户披露、毛利率、现金流和产能扩张节奏。

failureConditions.monitorEn: Monitor filings, announcements, customer disclosures, margin trend, cash-flow conversion, and capacity expansion timing.

business.thesisZh: Micron 的核心判断已从周期复苏进一步转向 AI 内存紧供给和战略客户协议兑现；Q3 FY2026 创纪录收入、毛利率和 Q4 指引强化了 HBM、数据中心 SSD 与先进 DRAM/NAND 的供给约束属性。
business.thesisEn: Micron thesis has shifted further from cyclical recovery toward tight AI memory supply and execution of strategic customer agreements; record Q3 FY2026 revenue, margin, and Q4 guidance reinforce the supply-constrained nature of HBM, data-center SSDs, and advanced DRAM/NAND.

supplyChain.thesis: Micron 是垂直整合的存储制造商，核心上游是晶圆厂设备、硅片、高纯化学品、电子气体、CMP/过滤耗材与先进封装生态。向原材料追溯后，瓶颈集中在高纯多晶硅/石英、稀有气体、光刻胶/湿化学品、金属靶材和先进封装材料。

tiers.title: 目标企业：存储器设计与制造
tiers.titleZh: 目标企业：存储器设计与制造
tiers.titleEn: Target company: memory design and manufacturing

entities.name: Micron Technology
entities.relationship: 目标企业本体；负责 DRAM、NAND、HBM、SSD、模块和托管 NAND 等产品的研发、制造、封装协同、销售和客户认证。
entities.relationshipZh: 目标企业本体；负责 DRAM、NAND、HBM、SSD、模块和托管 NAND 等产品的研发、制造、封装协同、销售和客户认证。
entities.relationshipEn: Target company; responsible for R&D, manufacturing, packaging coordination, sales, and customer qualification for DRAM, NAND, HBM, SSDs, modules, and managed NAND.

relationshipStrength.label: 目标公司
relationshipStrength.rationale: 目标公司本身，是本页产业链分析的参照对象。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 目标公司本身，是本页产业链分析的参照对象。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: The target company itself, used as the reference point for this supply-chain analysis.

tiers.notes: Micron 是美国上市存储制造商，制造足迹覆盖美国、日本、台湾、新加坡等地。
tiers.notesZh: Micron 是美国上市存储制造商，制造足迹覆盖美国、日本、台湾、新加坡等地。
tiers.notesEn: Micron is a U.S.-listed memory manufacturer with manufacturing footprints across the United States, Japan, Taiwan, Singapore, and other regions.

tiers.title: 晶圆厂设备与制程工具
tiers.titleZh: 晶圆厂设备与制程工具

entities.name: ASML
entities.relationship: 光刻设备供应链关键公司；Micron 的先进 DRAM/HBM 和 NAND 制造需要光刻步骤，EUV/DUV 设备影响先进节点扩产与良率。具体采购比例未逐项公开。
entities.relationshipZh: 光刻设备供应链关键公司；Micron 的先进 DRAM/HBM 和 NAND 制造需要光刻步骤，EUV/DUV 设备影响先进节点扩产与良率。具体采购比例未逐项公开。
entities.relationshipEn: Key lithography equipment company; Micron's advanced DRAM/HBM and NAND manufacturing requires lithography steps, and EUV/DUV tool availability affects node scaling and yields. Micron does not disclose exact purchase mix by supplier.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

entities.name: Applied Materials
entities.relationship: 与 Micron 在下一代 DRAM、HBM 和 NAND 材料/制程上开展公开合作；同时是存储晶圆制造中的沉积、材料工程和先进封装设备供应链核心公司。
entities.relationshipZh: 与 Micron 在下一代 DRAM、HBM 和 NAND 材料/制程上开展公开合作；同时是存储晶圆制造中的沉积、材料工程和先进封装设备供应链核心公司。
entities.relationshipEn: Applied Materials has a disclosed collaboration with Micron on next-generation DRAM, HBM, and NAND, and is a core supplier category for deposition, materials engineering, and advanced packaging process equipment used in memory manufacturing.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

entities.name: Lam Research
entities.relationship: 刻蚀、沉积和清洗工具供应链核心公司；Lam 公开说明其 DRAM/HBM 与 NAND 制程技术用于推进先进存储制造。Micron 未披露逐项采购金额。
entities.relationshipZh: 刻蚀、沉积和清洗工具供应链核心公司；Lam 公开说明其 DRAM/HBM 与 NAND 制程技术用于推进先进存储制造。Micron 未披露逐项采购金额。
entities.relationshipEn: Core etch, deposition, and clean tool supplier category; Lam publicly describes DRAM/HBM and NAND process technologies used for advanced memory manufacturing. Micron does not disclose supplier-by-supplier spending.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

entities.name: Tokyo Electron
entities.relationship: 前道制程设备供应链公司，覆盖涂胶显影、沉积、刻蚀等环节；对 Micron 的关系属于存储晶圆制造设备生态，具体采购比例未公开。
entities.relationshipZh: 前道制程设备供应链公司，覆盖涂胶显影、沉积、刻蚀等环节；对 Micron 的关系属于存储晶圆制造设备生态，具体采购比例未公开。
entities.relationshipEn: Front-end process equipment supplier category covering coater/developer, deposition, and etch tools; tracked as part of the memory wafer manufacturing equipment ecosystem rather than a disclosed supplier-spend line item.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

entities.name: KLA
entities.relationship: 过程控制、检测和量测设备供应链公司；对 DRAM/HBM 与 NAND 良率爬坡、缺陷控制和先进节点量产有关键间接作用。
entities.relationshipZh: 过程控制、检测和量测设备供应链公司；对 DRAM/HBM 与 NAND 良率爬坡、缺陷控制和先进节点量产有关键间接作用。
entities.relationshipEn: Process-control, inspection, and metrology supplier category; important for yield ramp, defect control, and advanced-node production in DRAM/HBM and NAND manufacturing.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

tiers.notes: Micron 10-K 披露其部分原材料和生产设备只有有限供应商甚至单一供应商；设备层用于跟踪产能和良率瓶颈。
tiers.notesZh: Micron 10-K 披露其部分原材料和生产设备只有有限供应商甚至单一供应商；设备层用于跟踪产能和良率瓶颈。
tiers.notesEn: Micron's 10-K notes that some raw materials and production equipment have limited or single-source suppliers; this layer tracks capacity and yield bottlenecks.

tiers.title: 硅片、化学品、气体与耗材
tiers.titleZh: 硅片、化学品、气体与耗材

entities.name: Shin-Etsu
entities.relationship: 半导体硅片与材料供应链核心公司；从多晶硅/单晶硅到低缺陷硅片，属于 Micron 晶圆制造上游原材料层。
entities.relationshipZh: 半导体硅片与材料供应链核心公司；从多晶硅/单晶硅到低缺陷硅片，属于 Micron 晶圆制造上游原材料层。
entities.relationshipEn: Core semiconductor silicon wafer and materials supplier category; from polysilicon and single-crystal silicon to low-defect wafers, it sits upstream of Micron's wafer fabrication flow.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

entities.name: SUMCO
entities.relationship: 300mm 等半导体硅片供应链公司；对应 Micron DRAM、NAND 和 HBM 晶圆制造中的基底材料。
entities.relationshipZh: 300mm 等半导体硅片供应链公司；对应 Micron DRAM、NAND 和 HBM 晶圆制造中的基底材料。
entities.relationshipEn: Semiconductor silicon wafer supplier category, including 300mm wafers; maps to the substrate material used in Micron's DRAM, NAND, and HBM wafer manufacturing.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

entities.name: Entegris
entities.relationship: 半导体材料、过滤、CMP 和流体管理耗材供应链公司；对 Micron 存储晶圆制程中的污染控制、CMP 和材料搬运有间接关键作用。
entities.relationshipZh: 半导体材料、过滤、CMP 和流体管理耗材供应链公司；对 Micron 存储晶圆制程中的污染控制、CMP 和材料搬运有间接关键作用。
entities.relationshipEn: Materials, filtration, CMP, and fluid-management supplier category; important for contamination control, CMP, and materials handling in Micron's memory wafer processes.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

entities.name: Linde
entities.relationship: 电子特气和大宗气体供应链公司；氮气、氩气、氢气、氧气、氦气和特种气体用于沉积、刻蚀、清洗和惰性环境等半导体制程。
entities.relationshipZh: 电子特气和大宗气体供应链公司；氮气、氩气、氢气、氧气、氦气和特种气体用于沉积、刻蚀、清洗和惰性环境等半导体制程。
entities.relationshipEn: Electronics specialty and bulk gas supplier category; nitrogen, argon, hydrogen, oxygen, helium, and specialty gases support deposition, etch, clean, and inert-atmosphere semiconductor processes.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

entities.name: Air Liquide
entities.relationship: 电子材料和高纯气体供应链公司；对存储晶圆厂的刻蚀、沉积、清洗和现场供气体系有间接关键作用。
entities.relationshipZh: 电子材料和高纯气体供应链公司；对存储晶圆厂的刻蚀、沉积、清洗和现场供气体系有间接关键作用。
entities.relationshipEn: Electronics materials and high-purity gas supplier category; indirectly important for etch, deposition, cleaning, and on-site gas systems in memory fabs.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 处于原材料或高纯材料层，产业扩产时通常最先形成供给、认证或价格约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Sits in the raw-material or high-purity material layer, where expansion cycles often first create supply, qualification, or pricing constraints.

tiers.notes: 这一层多数是 Micron 供应商的供应商或关键类别供应商；公开披露通常不会逐项列出采购金额。
tiers.notesZh: 这一层多数是 Micron 供应商的供应商或关键类别供应商；公开披露通常不会逐项列出采购金额。
tiers.notesEn: Many entities in this layer are suppliers to Micron's suppliers or critical category suppliers; public disclosures usually do not provide supplier-by-supplier purchase amounts.

tiers.title: 封装、测试与系统集成生态
tiers.titleZh: 封装、测试与系统集成生态

entities.name: ASE Technology
entities.relationship: 全球封装与测试生态参与者；Micron 拥有内部封装/测试能力，但 HBM、DRAM/NAND 模块和 SSD 系统也需要先进封装、测试和板级协同生态支持。
entities.relationshipZh: 全球封装与测试生态参与者；Micron 拥有内部封装/测试能力，但 HBM、DRAM/NAND 模块和 SSD 系统也需要先进封装、测试和板级协同生态支持。
entities.relationshipEn: Global assembly and test ecosystem participant; Micron has internal assembly/test capability, while HBM, DRAM/NAND modules, and SSD platforms still depend on broader advanced packaging, test, and board-level ecosystem support.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Directly enters critical manufacturing, memory, or packaging layers, strongly affecting capacity, yield, and delivery cadence.

entities.name: Amkor
entities.relationship: 外包封装与测试生态公司；对高端存储器、控制器、SSD 和系统级产品的封装/测试产能弹性有间接作用。
entities.relationshipZh: 外包封装与测试生态公司；对高端存储器、控制器、SSD 和系统级产品的封装/测试产能弹性有间接作用。
entities.relationshipEn: Outsourced assembly and test ecosystem company; indirectly relevant to packaging/test capacity flexibility for high-end memory, controllers, SSDs, and system-level products.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 直接进入关键制造、存储或封装环节，对产能、良率和交付节奏有较强约束。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Directly enters critical manufacturing, memory, or packaging layers, strongly affecting capacity, yield, and delivery cadence.

tiers.notes: Micron 的先进存储产品既依赖内部制造/封测，也依赖外部先进封装、基板、测试和系统生态。
tiers.notesZh: Micron 的先进存储产品既依赖内部制造/封测，也依赖外部先进封装、基板、测试和系统生态。
tiers.notesEn: Micron's advanced memory products depend on both internal manufacturing/test and the external advanced packaging, substrate, test, and system ecosystem.

rawMaterials.name: Semiconductor-grade silicon
rawMaterials.risk: High purity, defect control and 300mm capacity are critical; supply is concentrated among a small number of global wafer makers.
rawMaterials.riskZh: 高纯度、低缺陷和 300mm 产能关键，全球硅片供应集中度较高。
rawMaterials.riskEn: High purity, defect control, and 300mm capacity are critical; global wafer supply is relatively concentrated.

rawMaterials.name: Electronic gases
rawMaterials.usedIn: Deposition, etch, chamber clean and inert environments
rawMaterials.usedInZh: 沉积、刻蚀、腔体清洗和惰性环境
rawMaterials.usedInEn: Deposition, etch, chamber clean, and inert environments
rawMaterials.risk: Purity, logistics and on-site supply reliability affect fab uptime; some rare gases can be exposed to geopolitical and energy-market shocks.
rawMaterials.riskZh: 纯度、物流和现场供气可靠性影响晶圆厂稼动率，部分稀有气体受地缘和能源市场冲击。
rawMaterials.riskEn: Purity, logistics, and on-site supply reliability affect fab uptime; some rare gases can be exposed to geopolitical and energy-market shocks.

rawMaterials.name: Photoresists and wet chemicals
rawMaterials.usedIn: Lithography, cleaning, etch and planarization process flows
rawMaterials.usedInZh: 光刻、清洗、刻蚀和平坦化流程
rawMaterials.usedInEn: Lithography, cleaning, etch, and planarization process flows
rawMaterials.risk: Advanced-node qualification can take time; a shortage or contamination event can disrupt yield.
rawMaterials.riskZh: 先进节点验证周期长，短缺或污染事件可能直接扰动良率。
rawMaterials.riskEn: Advanced-node qualification can take time; shortages or contamination events can disrupt yield.

rawMaterials.name: Advanced packaging materials
rawMaterials.usedIn: HBM stacks, TSV, interposers, substrates and SSD/module assembly
rawMaterials.usedInZh: HBM 堆叠、TSV、中介层、基板和 SSD/模块组装
rawMaterials.usedInEn: HBM stacks, TSV, interposers, substrates, and SSD/module assembly
upstreamZh: 底部填充胶与粘接材料
rawMaterials.risk: HBM ramp links memory wafers with advanced stacking, TSV, substrate and test capacity; bottlenecks can shift between wafer starts and packaging.
rawMaterials.riskZh: HBM 放量同时依赖存储晶圆、先进堆叠、TSV、基板和测试产能，瓶颈会在晶圆与封装之间切换。
rawMaterials.riskEn: HBM ramps link memory wafers with advanced stacking, TSV, substrate, and test capacity; bottlenecks can move between wafer starts and packaging.

downstream.thesis: Micron 处于 AI、云、移动、PC、汽车和工业供应链的中上游：它向平台公司、数据中心 OEM/云客户、移动/客户端 OEM 与汽车/嵌入式客户供应内存和存储，再由这些客户把产品整合进 GPU 平台、服务器、SSD 系统、手机、PC 和车辆。
downstream.thesisZh: Micron 处于 AI、云、移动、PC、汽车和工业供应链的中上游：它向平台公司、数据中心 OEM/云客户、移动/客户端 OEM 与汽车/嵌入式客户供应内存和存储，再由这些客户把产品整合进 GPU 平台、服务器、SSD 系统、手机、PC 和车辆。
downstream.thesisEn: Micron sits upstream to midstream in AI, cloud, mobile, PC, automotive, and industrial supply chains: it supplies memory and storage to platform companies, data center OEM/cloud customers, mobile/client OEMs, and automotive/embedded customers, who integrate those products into GPU platforms, servers, SSD systems, phones, PCs, and vehicles.

tiers.title: AI GPU 与加速计算平台客户
tiers.titleZh: AI GPU 与加速计算平台客户
tiers.titleEn: AI GPU and accelerated-computing platform customers

entities.name: NVIDIA
entities.customerRoleZh: AI 加速器与平台客户
entities.relationship: Micron 官方披露 24GB 8H HBM3E 将用于 NVIDIA H200；2026 年又披露 HBM4 36GB 12H 已量产并面向 NVIDIA Vera Rubin 平台设计，同时 PCIe Gen6 SSD 和 SOCAMM2 也面向 NVIDIA 新平台生态。
entities.relationshipZh: Micron 官方披露 24GB 8H HBM3E 将用于 NVIDIA H200；2026 年又披露 HBM4 36GB 12H 已量产并面向 NVIDIA Vera Rubin 平台设计，同时 PCIe Gen6 SSD 和 SOCAMM2 也面向 NVIDIA 新平台生态。
entities.relationshipEn: Micron disclosed that its 24GB 8-high HBM3E would be part of NVIDIA H200; in 2026 it also disclosed high-volume HBM4 36GB 12-high designed for NVIDIA Vera Rubin, with PCIe Gen6 SSD and SOCAMM2 products tied to NVIDIA's next-generation platform ecosystem.
productsServices: PCIe Gen6 data center SSDs and SOCAMM2
productsServicesZh: 用于 NVIDIA H200 的 HBM3E
用于 NVIDIA Vera Rubin 的 HBM4
PCIe Gen6 数据中心 SSD 与 SOCAMM2
productsServicesEn: PCIe Gen6 data center SSDs and SOCAMM2

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: NVIDIA 需求直接拉动关键制造或存储产能，是比普通终端客户更紧密的需求来源。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: NVIDIA 需求直接拉动关键制造或存储产能，是比普通终端客户更紧密的需求来源。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: NVIDIA demand directly pulls critical manufacturing or memory capacity, making it a tighter demand source than an ordinary end customer.

tiers.notes: HBM 和高速 SSD/内存模块把 Micron 直接连接到 AI 加速器平台；这也是当前最重要的下游增长线索。
tiers.notesZh: HBM 和高速 SSD/内存模块把 Micron 直接连接到 AI 加速器平台；这也是当前最重要的下游增长线索。
tiers.notesEn: HBM and high-speed SSD/memory modules connect Micron directly to AI accelerator platforms; this is the most important downstream growth signal today.

tiers.title: 数据中心、移动、客户端和汽车 OEM
tiers.titleZh: 数据中心、移动、客户端和汽车 OEM
tiers.titleEn: Data center, mobile, client, and automotive OEMs

entities.name: Hyperscale cloud and data center OEM customers
entities.nameZh: 超大规模云与数据中心 OEM 客户
entities.nameEn: Hyperscale cloud and data center OEM customers
entities.customerRole: Buyers and integrators of DRAM, HBM and data center SSDs
entities.customerRoleZh: DRAM、HBM 与数据中心 SSD 的采购方和集成方
entities.customerRoleEn: Buyers and integrators of DRAM, HBM, and data center SSDs
entities.relationship: Micron 10-K 披露 CMBU 面向 hyperscale 云数据中心，CDBU 面向中型云、企业和 OEM 数据中心客户；产品包括 HBM、DDR5/DDR4、LPDDR、GDDR、数据中心 SSD 和 NAND 组件。具体客户名单大多未逐项公开。
entities.relationshipZh: Micron 10-K 披露 CMBU 面向 hyperscale 云数据中心，CDBU 面向中型云、企业和 OEM 数据中心客户；产品包括 HBM、DDR5/DDR4、LPDDR、GDDR、数据中心 SSD 和 NAND 组件。具体客户名单大多未逐项公开。
entities.relationshipEn: Micron's 10-K says CMBU serves hyperscale cloud data centers and CDBU serves mid-tier cloud, enterprise, and OEM data center customers; products include HBM, DDR5/DDR4, LPDDR, GDDR, data center SSDs, and NAND components. Most customer names are not disclosed one by one.

listing.note: Customer category; individual public-company customers are not comprehensively disclosed.
listing.noteZh: 客户类别；具体上市客户名单未完整逐项披露。
listing.noteEn: Customer category; individual public-company customers are not comprehensively disclosed.

relationshipStrength.label: 中相关
relationshipStrength.rationale: 大型云或平台客户会影响需求预期，但传导链条位于采购和应用端，弱于供给瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: 大型云或平台客户会影响需求预期，但传导链条位于采购和应用端，弱于供给瓶颈。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: Large cloud or platform customers affect demand expectations, but the transmission sits on the purchasing and application side and is weaker than supply bottlenecks.

entities.name: Mobile and client OEM customers
entities.nameZh: 移动与客户端 OEM 客户
entities.customerRole: Smartphone, PC and client device makers
entities.customerRoleZh: 智能手机、PC 与客户端设备制造商
entities.customerRoleEn: Smartphone, PC, and client device makers
entities.relationship: MCBU 向移动和客户端市场销售 LPDDR、托管 NAND、UFS、客户端 SSD 和相关存储产品；Micron 同时宣布退出 Crucial 消费者渠道，以把供给转向更大的战略客户和高增长领域。
entities.relationshipZh: MCBU 向移动和客户端市场销售 LPDDR、托管 NAND、UFS、客户端 SSD 和相关存储产品；Micron 同时宣布退出 Crucial 消费者渠道，以把供给转向更大的战略客户和高增长领域。
entities.relationshipEn: MCBU sells LPDDR, managed NAND, UFS, client SSDs, and related storage products into mobile and client markets; Micron also announced its exit from the Crucial consumer channel to redirect supply toward larger strategic customers and faster-growing segments.

listing.note: Customer category; individual customers are usually confidential.
listing.noteZh: 客户类别；具体客户通常未公开披露。
listing.noteEn: Customer category; individual customers are usually confidential.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: NVIDIA 需求直接拉动关键制造或存储产能，是比普通终端客户更紧密的需求来源。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: NVIDIA 需求直接拉动关键制造或存储产能，是比普通终端客户更紧密的需求来源。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: NVIDIA demand directly pulls critical manufacturing or memory capacity, making it a tighter demand source than an ordinary end customer.

entities.name: Automotive and embedded OEM customers
entities.nameZh: 汽车与嵌入式 OEM 客户
entities.customerRole: Vehicle, industrial and embedded system makers
entities.customerRoleZh: 汽车、工业与嵌入式系统制造商
entities.customerRoleEn: Vehicle, industrial, and embedded system makers
entities.relationship: AEBU 面向汽车、工业和消费嵌入式应用供应长生命周期内存与存储；该板块受车规认证、长供货周期和成熟 DRAM/NAND 供需影响。
entities.relationshipZh: AEBU 面向汽车、工业和消费嵌入式应用供应长生命周期内存与存储；该板块受车规认证、长供货周期和成熟 DRAM/NAND 供需影响。
entities.relationshipEn: AEBU supplies long-life memory and storage for automotive, industrial, and embedded consumer applications; the segment is shaped by automotive qualification, long product lifecycles, and mature DRAM/NAND supply-demand.

listing.note: Customer category; individual customers are not comprehensively disclosed.
listing.noteZh: 客户类别；具体客户名单未完整逐项披露。
listing.noteEn: Customer category; individual customers are not comprehensively disclosed.

relationshipStrength.label: 核心瓶颈
relationshipStrength.rationale: NVIDIA 需求直接拉动关键制造或存储产能，是比普通终端客户更紧密的需求来源。
relationshipStrength.rationaleZh: NVIDIA 需求直接拉动关键制造或存储产能，是比普通终端客户更紧密的需求来源。
relationshipStrength.rationaleEn: NVIDIA demand directly pulls critical manufacturing or memory capacity, making it a tighter demand source than an ordinary end customer.

tiers.notes: 除 NVIDIA 等公开命名关系外，美光大多数下游客户按市场类别披露，适合先按客户群跟踪，再在后续研究中逐个补充公开上市公司客户。
tiers.notesZh: 除 NVIDIA 等公开命名关系外，美光大多数下游客户按市场类别披露，适合先按客户群跟踪，再在后续研究中逐个补充公开上市公司客户。
tiers.notesEn: Aside from publicly named relationships such as NVIDIA, most Micron downstream customers are disclosed by market category; this should be tracked by customer group first and then expanded company by company as public evidence appears.

scarceLayers.name: 晶圆厂设备与制程工具
scarceLayers.nameZh: 晶圆厂设备与制程工具
scarceLayers.whyScarce: Micron 10-K 披露其部分原材料和生产设备只有有限供应商甚至单一供应商；设备层用于跟踪产能和良率瓶颈。
scarceLayers.whyScarceZh: Micron 10-K 披露其部分原材料和生产设备只有有限供应商甚至单一供应商；设备层用于跟踪产能和良率瓶颈。
scarceLayers.whyScarceEn: Micron's 10-K notes that some raw materials and production equipment have limited or single-source suppliers; this layer tracks capacity and yield bottlenecks.

failureConditions.condition: 如果该层级的扩产、替代供应或客户认证进展快于预期，稀缺性判断需要下调。
failureConditions.conditionZh: 如果该层级的扩产、替代供应或客户认证进展快于预期，稀缺性判断需要下调。
failureConditions.conditionEn: The scarcity call should be reduced if capacity additions, substitute supply, or customer qualification progress faster than expected.
failureConditions.monitor: 跟踪供应商公告、财报产能指引、客户认证、价格和交付周期变化。
failureConditions.monitorZh: 跟踪供应商公告、财报产能指引、客户认证、价格和交付周期变化。
failureConditions.monitorEn: Monitor supplier filings, capacity guidance, customer qualification, pricing, and delivery lead times.

scarceLayers.name: 硅片、化学品、气体与耗材
scarceLayers.nameZh: 硅片、化学品、气体与耗材
scarceLayers.whyScarce: 这一层多数是 Micron 供应商的供应商或关键类别供应商；公开披露通常不会逐项列出采购金额。
scarceLayers.whyScarceZh: 这一层多数是 Micron 供应商的供应商或关键类别供应商；公开披露通常不会逐项列出采购金额。
scarceLayers.whyScarceEn: Many entities in this layer are suppliers to Micron's suppliers or critical category suppliers; public disclosures usually do not provide supplier-by-supplier purchase amounts.

failureConditions.condition: 如果该层级的扩产、替代供应或客户认证进展快于预期，稀缺性判断需要下调。

failureConditions.monitor: 跟踪供应商公告、财报产能指引、客户认证、价格和交付周期变化。
failureConditions.monitorZh: 跟踪供应商公告、财报产能指引、客户认证、价格和交付周期变化。
failureConditions.monitorEn: Monitor supplier filings, capacity guidance, customer qualification, pricing, and delivery lead times.

scarceLayers.whyScarceZh: Micron 的先进存储产品既依赖内部制造/封测，也依赖外部先进封装、基板、测试和系统生态。
scarceLayers.whyScarceEn: Micron's advanced memory products depend on both internal manufacturing/test and the external advanced packaging, substrate, test, and system ecosystem.

news.title: Micron 发布 2026 财年第三财季创纪录业绩
news.titleZh: Micron 发布 2026 财年第三财季创纪录业绩
news.titleEn: Micron reports record third-quarter FY2026 results
news.summary: 季度收入 414.56 亿美元，GAAP 毛利率 84.6%，GAAP 摊薄 EPS 24.67 美元；公司称 Q4 展望更强，并给出收入 500 亿美元上下 10 亿美元的指引。
news.summaryZh: 季度收入 414.56 亿美元，GAAP 毛利率 84.6%，GAAP 摊薄 EPS 24.67 美元；公司称 Q4 展望更强，并给出收入 500 亿美元上下 10 亿美元的指引。
news.summaryEn: Revenue was $41.456B, GAAP gross margin was 84.6%, and GAAP diluted EPS was $24.67; Micron also guided Q4 FY2026 revenue to $50.0B plus or minus $1.0B.
news.impact: AI 时代内存紧供给和战略客户协议继续推升收入与利润弹性；后续重点跟踪 HBM、数据中心 SSD、资本开支和客户协议兑现。
news.impactZh: AI 时代内存紧供给和战略客户协议继续推升收入与利润弹性；后续重点跟踪 HBM、数据中心 SSD、资本开支和客户协议兑现。
news.impactEn: Tight AI-era memory supply and strategic customer agreements continue to lift revenue and profit leverage; HBM, data-center SSDs, capex, and customer-agreement execution remain key follow-up items.

news.title: Micron 发布 2026 财年第二财季创纪录业绩
news.titleZh: Micron 发布 2026 财年第二财季创纪录业绩
news.titleEn: Micron reports record second-quarter FY2026 results
news.summary: 季度收入 238.60 亿美元，GAAP 毛利率 74.4%，GAAP 摊薄 EPS 12.07 美元，并给出 Q3 FY2026 收入 335 亿美元上下 7.5 亿美元的指引。
news.summaryZh: 季度收入 238.60 亿美元，GAAP 毛利率 74.4%，GAAP 摊薄 EPS 12.07 美元，并给出 Q3 FY2026 收入 335 亿美元上下 7.5 亿美元的指引。
news.summaryEn: Revenue was $23.86 billion, GAAP gross margin was 74.4%, GAAP diluted EPS was $12.07, and Q3 FY2026 revenue guidance was $33.5 billion plus or minus $750 million.
news.impact: AI 时代内存价值、紧供给和价格上行成为核心业绩驱动；后续要跟踪 HBM、先进 DRAM/NAND 和资本开支执行。
news.impactZh: AI 时代内存价值、紧供给和价格上行成为核心业绩驱动；后续要跟踪 HBM、先进 DRAM/NAND 和资本开支执行。
news.impactEn: The results show memory value, tight supply, and pricing as key drivers in the AI era; HBM, advanced DRAM/NAND, and capex execution remain core follow-up items.

news.title: Micron HBM4 面向 NVIDIA Vera Rubin 平台进入高量产
news.titleZh: Micron HBM4 面向 NVIDIA Vera Rubin 平台进入高量产
news.titleEn: Micron HBM4 for NVIDIA Vera Rubin enters high-volume production
news.summary: Micron 披露 HBM4 36GB 12H 已在 2026 年第一季度出货并面向 NVIDIA Vera Rubin 设计，同时 PCIe Gen6 SSD 和 SOCAMM2 也服务于 NVIDIA 新一代平台生态。
news.summaryZh: Micron 披露 HBM4 36GB 12H 已在 2026 年第一季度出货并面向 NVIDIA Vera Rubin 设计，同时 PCIe Gen6 SSD 和 SOCAMM2 也服务于 NVIDIA 新一代平台生态。
news.summaryEn: Micron said HBM4 36GB 12-high began volume shipment in Q1 calendar 2026 and is designed for NVIDIA Vera Rubin, alongside PCIe Gen6 SSD and SOCAMM2 products for NVIDIA's next-generation platform ecosystem.
news.impact: 这强化了 Micron 在 AI 加速器内存供应链中的下游连接，HBM 认证和产能可能继续影响收入结构。
news.impactZh: 这强化了 Micron 在 AI 加速器内存供应链中的下游连接，HBM 认证和产能可能继续影响收入结构。
news.impactEn: This strengthens Micron's downstream connection to AI accelerator platforms; HBM qualification and capacity may continue to shape revenue mix.

news.title: Micron 宣布退出 Crucial 消费者业务
news.titleZh: Micron 宣布退出 Crucial 消费者业务
news.titleEn: Micron announces exit from the Crucial consumer business
news.summary: 公司计划在 2026 财年第二财季末前继续向消费者渠道出货 Crucial 产品，之后将供给和资源转向更大的战略客户及高增长领域。
news.summaryZh: 公司计划在 2026 财年第二财季末前继续向消费者渠道出货 Crucial 产品，之后将供给和资源转向更大的战略客户及高增长领域。
news.summaryEn: Micron planned to continue Crucial consumer-channel shipments through the end of fiscal Q2 2026, then redirect supply and resources toward larger strategic customers and faster-growing segments.
news.impact: 这说明管理层愿意牺牲部分消费者渠道曝光，把有限 DRAM/NAND 供给转向 AI 数据中心和企业客户。
news.impactZh: 这说明管理层愿意牺牲部分消费者渠道曝光，把有限 DRAM/NAND 供给转向 AI 数据中心和企业客户。
news.impactEn: The move shows management's willingness to reduce consumer-channel exposure and redirect constrained DRAM/NAND supply toward AI data center and enterprise customers.

news.title: Micron FY2025 年收入达到 373.78 亿美元
news.titleZh: Micron 2025 财年收入达到 373.78 亿美元
news.summary: FY2025 收入同比增长 49%，GAAP 净利润 85.39 亿美元，公司称数据中心业务达到历史高位。
news.summaryZh: FY2025 收入同比增长 49%，GAAP 净利润 85.39 亿美元，公司称数据中心业务达到历史高位。
news.summaryEn: FY2025 revenue increased 49% year over year to $37.378 billion and GAAP net income was $8.539 billion; the company said its data center business reached all-time highs.
news.impact: FY2025 是从存储周期底部恢复并向 AI 数据中心加速倾斜的基准年。
news.impactZh: FY2025 是从存储周期底部恢复并向 AI 数据中心加速倾斜的基准年。
news.impactEn: FY2025 is the baseline year for recovery from the memory downcycle and accelerated mix shift toward AI data centers.

themeExposure.rationale: HBM/DRAM 直接进入 AI 加速器和数据中心平台，扩产、良率和认证会影响 GPU 系统交付。
themeExposure.rationaleZh: HBM/DRAM 直接进入 AI 加速器和数据中心平台，扩产、良率和认证会影响 GPU 系统交付。
themeExposure.rationaleEn: HBM/DRAM directly enters AI accelerators and data-center platforms, so capacity, yield, and qualification affect GPU-system delivery.
